subject: Spewpa, a cocoon-stage bug Pokémon, resting in a grassy outdoor setting
description: A small, roughly spherical cocoon creature sits amid tall green grasses and foliage. Its body is white with irregular colored geometric patches — small squares in red and yellow are scattered across the surface. A dark rounded head protrudes from the top with two large, simple round eyes giving it an almost doll-like face. The background features lush green trees and grasses, soft and painterly. The scene is calm and pastoral, the creature barely distinguishable from a seed pod or natural object at first glance. The palette is dominated by greens and whites with small warm accent colors.
foreground: Spewpa cocoon body, white with colored square patches, dark head with round eyes
background: Lush green grasses and trees, soft painterly style
emotion: passive, inert — cocoon stage, no visible expression beyond wide eyes
